title: The Town Mouse and the Country Mouse
synopsis: A country mouse visits his rich town cousin and learns that comfort is not everything. A story about choosing peace over luxury.
sentences: A Country Mouse once invited his cousin from the town to visit his simple home.
He served plain grain, roots, and a few small seeds.
The Town Mouse ate politely, but he could not hide his surprise.
"You live very simply," he said. "Come to town with me and see a grander life."
So the Country Mouse went with him to the town that very evening.
There, they found a table full of bread, cake, and fine food left after a great feast.
The Country Mouse had just begun to eat when a loud noise came from the next room.
The two mice ran in fear and hid in a small crack in the wall.
When the room grew quiet, they came back to the table, but another sound soon sent them running again.
At last, the Country Mouse shook his head.
"You may keep your rich food and your danger," he said. "I would rather live simply and safely."
Peace and safety are often better than wealth with fear.
